autoresearch_gaps.claim: Autonomous research agents can automate idea-to-report workflows, but final reports still need explicit claim calibration.
autoresearch_gaps.experiment: Compare classic_autoresearch against lucky_loop_full claim ledger outcomes.
autoresearch_gaps.implication: Lucky Loop must separate observations from claims and force report claims through a verifier.

autoresearch_gaps.claim: ML-agent benchmarks and search policies emphasize final performance more than prospective prediction before compute.
autoresearch_gaps.experiment: Measure Qwen-AgentWorld prediction-vs-reality for every Lucky Loop candidate decision.
autoresearch_gaps.implication: Lucky Loop should log state, candidate action, predicted observation, real observation, and comparison.

autoresearch_gaps.claim: Single-run leaderboard wins can overstate robustness when top models are close across seeds.
autoresearch_gaps.experiment: Detect top observed models, rerun matched seeds, and compare effect size against seed noise.
autoresearch_gaps.implication: A robust best-model claim requires matched multi-seed top-model verification.

autoresearch_gaps.claim: End-to-end autoresearch needs literature context, execution, analysis, and report generation tied to auditable evidence.
autoresearch_gaps.experiment: Generate reports/autoresearch/<slug>/ with sources.json, research_context.json, experiment_plan.json, and evidence_manifest.json.
autoresearch_gaps.implication: The workspace must preserve sources, experiment plans, commands, traces, claim ledgers, and final report links.

literature_limit: metadata, abstracts, curated notes, and arXiv IDs; full PDFs are not parsed in v1

study_gap.claim: Random splits can inflate apparent generalization on temporally or subject-correlated sensor data.
